Good morning. Let me present the first quarter figures. Total revenue increased by twelve percent. The iron division had the highest growth. Profit is higher than last year. We forecast steady growth for the next quarter.

Good morning, everyone. Let me present the first quarter figures. Our total revenue increased by twelve percent. The iron division had the highest growth, and profit is higher than last year. The agriculture division had a small decrease of three percent.

Thank you, Rafael. I have a few questions about the numbers. The iron division grew faster than agriculture. What is your forecast for the next quarter? And is the profit higher or lower than last year?
